code: import axios from'axios';const BASE=process.env.REACT_APP_API_URL||'';const API=axios.create({baseURL:`${BASE}/api`});export const getContacts=function(){let search=arguments.length>0&&arguments[0]!==undefined?arguments[0]:'';return API.get('/chats',{params:search?{search}:{}});};export const uploadChats=files=>{const formData=new FormData();files.forEach(file=>formData.append('files',file));return API.post('/chats/upload',formData,{headers:{'Content-Type':'multipart/form-data'}});};export const getChatByPhone=phone=>API.get(`/chats/${phone}`);export const deleteChat=phone=>API.delete(`/chats/${phone}`);
